hooks.name: Roadtrip Map Update Check
hooks.description: After a roadtrip markdown is edited, checks whether stations or route order changed and asks the user if the route map should be re-rendered.

action.prompt: A roadtrip file was edited. Check whether stations, route order, or coordinates changed. If yes, ask the user: 'Should I re-render the route map?' If only text (descriptions, restaurants, prices) was changed, no re-rendering is needed — do not respond.
